description: Sector overlay for pharmaceutical drugs, biologics, drug establishment licensing, market authorization, GMP, labelling, advertising, pharmacovigilance, and compliance documentation in Canada.

metadata.scope: Canada-only sector overlay controls for Pharmaceuticals. Intended to be used with canada_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. Provincial/territorial obligations may apply and are not exhaustively encoded. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Classification of products under the Food and Drugs Act
Drugs and health products compliance and enforcement

rules.title: Health Canada market authorization or drug-product approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for DIN, NOC, market authorization, Health Canada approval, or drug product authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Drug Establishment Licence or establishment control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Drug Establishment Licence, DEL, establishment licence, manufacturing, importing, distribution, or testing evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Health Canada drug products legislation and compliance materials

rules.title: GMP and quality-system evidence is documented
rules.summary: Checks for GMP, quality assurance, batch records, validation, quality control, or release controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Food and Drug Regulations / Health Canada pharmaceutical compliance

rules.title: Drug labelling, advertising, or safety communication controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for labelling, prescribing information, adverse reaction, recall, pharmacovigilance, or advertising controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
